title: Build wireless channel simulator
description: Python module simulating LoRa radio propagation. Features: (1) Distance-based path loss model, (2) SF/BW impact on range and data rate, (3) Packet collision detection (simultaneous TX), (4) Configurable packet loss/BER, (5) Propagation delay, (6) Duty cycle tracking per node, (7) SNR/RSSI calculation. Should support multiple nodes in a topology.
close_reason: Complete. All components built across Waves 2-7: propagation.py (path loss), medium.py (collisions), duty_cycle.py (tracking), transmission.py (airtime). 428+ tests pass.
